_meta.description: Signal weights and regime multipliers. This is the ONLY file the self-refinement pass may modify.
_meta.philosophy: There are always winners in any market. The regime determines WHERE they are, not WHETHER they exist. Never reduce to zero — redirect.

risk_on.note: Fundamentals showing strong IC (0.0512) in risk_on — boosted further. Momentum IC weak overall (0.0064 in risk_on), trimmed slightly. Sentiment actively harmful in risk_on (IC=-0.0798, hit_rate=0.4264) — keep at floor. Catalyst also weak in risk_on (IC=0.0011).

trending_mixed.note: Sentiment showing very strong IC (0.1177) and hit_rate (0.5625) in trending_mixed — boosted. Catalyst also strong (IC=0.0738, hit_rate=0.5459). Both confirmed again this period. Weekly alpha of +0.0223 in trending_mixed confirms direction.

choppy_neutral.note: Pure momentum fades. Winners have specific catalysts or strong fundamentals driving them independent of market.

risk_off_mild.note: Sector rotation is the game. Find what IS working — defensives, commodities, short squeezes, idiosyncratic catalysts. Winners exist, look harder. No data this period (nan ICs) — hold current settings.

risk_off_severe.note: The biggest weekly winners often happen in brutal markets. Short squeezes, FDA approvals, takeovers, contra-trend sector pops. Catalyst (IC=0.0828) and momentum (IC=0.0987) both strong in risk_off_severe. Fundamentals less predictive (IC=-0.0044). Sentiment positive but lower — maintain current balance.
